lines.english: All the continents, islands and worlds meditate in remembrance.
The nether worlds and spheres meditate in remembrance on that True Lord.
Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva meditate in remembrance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਖਾਣੀ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਸਗਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: simareh khaanee simareh baanee simareh sagale har janaa |2|
lines.english: The sources of creation and speech meditate in remembrance; all the Lord's humble servants meditate in remembrance. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਜਖੵਿ ਦੈਤ ਸਭਿ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਅਗਨਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਜਸੁ ਗਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: simareh jakhay dait sabh simareh aganat na jaaee jas ganaa |3|
lines.english: The titans and demons all meditate in remembrance; Your Praises are uncountable - they cannot be counted. ||3||
The three hundred thirty million gods meditate in remembrance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਤਾ ਬਲੀ ਸਾਖ ਸਭ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਭ ਮਨਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: lataa balee saakh sabh simareh rav rahiaa suaamee sabh manaa |4|
lines.english: All the vines and branches meditate in remembrance; O my Lord and Master, You are permeating and pervading all minds. ||4||
All the beasts, birds and demons meditate in remembrance.
The forests, mountains and hermits meditate in remembrance.
All beings, both subtle and gross, meditate in remembrance.
The Siddhas and seekers meditate in remembrance on the Lord's Mantra.
Men and women, throughout the four stages of life, meditate in remembrance on You.
All social classes and souls of all races meditate in remembrance on You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਪਤ ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਗਲ ਭਵਨ ਕਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਧਨਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gupat pragatt simareh prabh mere sagal bhavan kaa prabh dhanaa |5|
lines.english: Both the visible and the invisible meditate in remembrance on my God; God is the Master of all worlds. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਚਤੁਰ ਸਭਿ ਬੇਤੇ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਰੈਣੀ ਅਰੁ ਦਿਨਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: simareh gunee chatur sabh bete simareh rainee ar dinaa |6|
lines.english: All the virtuous, clever and wise people meditate in remembrance; night and day meditate in remembrance. ||6||
Hours, minutes and seconds meditate in remembrance.
Death and life, and thoughts of purification, meditate in remembrance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਸਉਣ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਸੰਜੋਗਾ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਲਖੀਐ ਇਕੁ ਖਿਨਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: simareh saun saasatr sanjogaa alakh na lakheeai ik khinaa |7|
lines.english: The Shaastras, with their lucky signs and joinings, meditate in remembrance; the invisible cannot be seen, even for an instant. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਲਾਵਹੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਸੋ ਜਿਨਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa jis bhagatee laavahu janam padaarath so jinaa |8|
lines.english: That person, whom You bless with Your Grace, and link to Your devotional service, wins this invaluable human life. ||8||
He is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of all hearts.
The Lord and Master is the Doer, the Cause of causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਵੂਠਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai man vootthaa prabh apanaa |
lines.english: He, within whose mind God dwells,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਜਪੁ ਜਪਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: poorai karam gur kaa jap japanaa |
lines.english: has perfect karma, and chants the Chant of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad vasai man jaa kai |
lines.english: Pain, sorrow and doubt run away from that one,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਤਾ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਜੋਨੀ ਭਰਮਿ ਰੁਨਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: sarab nirantar so prabh jaataa bahurr na jonee bharam runaa |9|
lines.english: One who realizes God pervading deep within all, does not wander crying in reincarnation again. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਭਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: dookh darad bhram taa kaa bhaagai |
lines.english: Within whose mind the Word of the Guru's Shabad abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਆਨੰਦ ਨਾਮ ਰਸੁ ਅਨਹਦ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sookh sehaj aanand naam ras anahad baanee sehaj dhunaa |10|
lines.english: Intuitive peace, poise and bliss come from the sublime essence of the Naam; the unstruck sound current of the Guru's Bani intuitively vibrates and resounds. ||10||
He alone is wealthy, who meditates on God.
He alone is honorable, who joins the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਵੂਠਾ ਸੋ ਪੂਰ ਕਰੰਮਾ ਨਾ ਛਿਨਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: paarabraham jaa kai man vootthaa so poor karamaa naa chhinaa |11|
lines.english: That person, within whose mind the Supreme Lord God abides, has perfect karma, and becomes famous. ||11||
The Lord and Master is pervading the water, land and sky.
There is no other said to be so.
The Lord's Court is the highest of the high.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਜਨਿ ਕਾਟਿਓ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਸਗਲਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੀਸੈ ਏਕ ਬਿਨਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: gur giaan anjan kaattio bhram sagalaa avar na deesai ek binaa |12|
lines.english: The ointment of the Guru's spiritual wisdom has eradicated all doubts; except the One Lord, I do not see any other at all. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰ ਅਥਾਹ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅਤੁਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਕਿਆ ਮਿਨਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: gahir ganbheer athaah suaamee atul na jaaee kiaa minaa |13|
lines.english: The Lord and Master is profoundly deep, unfathomable and unweighable; how can He be measured? ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kehan na jaaee ant na paaraa |
lines.english: His limit and extent cannot be described.
You are the Creator; all is created by You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਬੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: tujh bin avar na koee beea |
lines.english: Without You, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਮਧਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਤੂਹੈ ਸਗਲ ਪਸਾਰਾ ਤੁਮ ਤਨਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: aad madh ant prabh toohai sagal pasaaraa tum tanaa |14|
lines.english: You alone, God, are in the beginning, the middle and the end. You are the root of the entire expanse. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਜੋ ਸ੍ਰਵਣੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਜਸੁ ਸੁਨਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath taa ke pooran jo sravanee prabh kaa jas sunaa |15|
lines.english: All desires are fulfilled, for one who listens with his ears to the Praises of God. ||15||
The Messenger of Death does not even approach that person
who sings the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
O my true, deep and profound Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: too sabhanaa kaa sabh ko teraa |
lines.english: You belong to all, and all belong to You,
